_comment: Copy to vps_config.json and edit. Each 'repos' entry is EITHER an 'owner/name' string (served by the default GH_TOKEN, i.e. your token) OR an object for a repo that needs a different token. 'tmux_session' is the running Claude Code session. 'workdir' is where clones + worktrees (and 0600 per-repo token files) live.
_third_party_comment: For a repo you do NOT own, ask its OWNER to mint a fine-grained PAT scoped to that single repo (Issues + Pull requests: Read & write) and use {'repo': 'their/repo', 'token_env': 'THEIR_TOKEN'} with the token in .env, OR {'repo': 'their/repo', 'token': 'ghp_...'} inline (vps_config.json is gitignored). Never commit a token. See README 'Adding a third-party repo'.
